field.name: ma_dc
field.check: ma_dc not in (select ma_dc from dmccdc)⩓ma_dc in (select a.ma_dc from dmccdc a left join dmdvcsks b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dc = @@table.ma_dc and b.ngay_ks >= @@table.ngay_hl_tu)⩓not exists(select 1 from cthspbdc b where @@table.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and @@table.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and @@table.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and @@table.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and @@table.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and @@table.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu and @@table.ngay_hl_den = b.ngay_hl_den) and not exists(select 1 from dmccdc c where @@table.ma_dc = c.ma_dc and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1))⩓exists(select 1 from cthspbdc b where @@table.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and @@table.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and @@table.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and @@table.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and @@table.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and @@table.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu and @@table.ngay_hl_den = b.ngay_hl_den) and not exists(select 1 from dmccdc c where @@table.ma_dc = c.ma_dc and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit = 1))

field.name: ma_bp_dc
field.check: ma_bp_dc not in (select ma_bp from dmbpcc)⩓not exists(select 1 from dmdcct b where b.ma_dc = @@table.ma_dc and b.ma_bp_dc = @@table.ma_bp_dc) and not exists(select 1 from dcbpsddc b where b.ma_dc = @@table.ma_dc and b.ma_bp_den = @@table.ma_bp_dc)

field.name: tk_pb
field.check: tk_pb not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: tk_cp
field.check: tk_cp not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_kh
field.check: ma_kh <> '' and ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: so_lsx
field.check: so_lsx <> '' and ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)) not in (select ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)) from phlsx)

field.name: ma_hd
field.check: ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)

field.name: ngay_hl_tu
field.check: ngay_hl_tu > ngay_hl_den⩓exists(select 1 from dmstt b where (@@table.ngay_hl_tu < b.ngay_gh1) or (@@table.ngay_hl_tu > b.ngay_gh2) or (@@table.ngay_hl_tu <= b.ngay_ks))

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'TS2AllocationCoefficient', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @maxLength int, @r int, @overlapped nvarchar(512) select @overlapped = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Ngày hiệu lực giao hoặc trùng nhau tại dòng %s.' else N'The effective date range overlapped or duplicated at row %s.' end select @maxLength = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'cthspbdc' and column_name = 'so_lsx' -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@maxLength - len(rtrim(so_lsx))) + rtrim(so_lsx) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from cthspbdc b where a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and a.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu and a.ngay_hl_den = b.ngay_hl_den) -- Checking &Checking; -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join cthspbdc b on a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and a.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu and a.ngay_hl_den = b.ngay_hl_den delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and a.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu and a.ngay_hl_den = b.ngay_hl_den) -- Date select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a, @@table b where a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and a.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and (a.ngay_hl_tu <> b.ngay_hl_tu or a.ngay_hl_den <> b.ngay_hl_den) and a.ngay_hl_tu <= b.ngay_hl_den and a.ngay_hl_den >= b.ngay_hl_tu&ErrorDate; select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a, cthspbdc b where a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp_dc and a.tk_pb = b.tk_pb and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and (a.ngay_hl_tu <> b.ngay_hl_tu or a.ngay_hl_den <> b.ngay_hl_den) and a.ngay_hl_tu <= b.ngay_hl_den and a.ngay_hl_den >= b.ngay_hl_tu&ErrorDate; -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' &Updating;
